The issue is that my old_string has a trailing newline after `})` but the actual file content doesn't match exactly. Let me try with exact whitespace matching. The lines are:
- `    })` (line 195)
- `` (empty line 196)
- `    it("rejects empty string", () => {` (line 197)
- `      expect(() => hashToken("")).toThrow()` (line 198)
- `    })` (line 199)
- `  })` (line 200)

So I need to match exactly:
```
    it("rejects empty string", () => {
      expect(() => hashToken("")).toThrow()
    })
  })
```

Let me try with exact matching including the closing `})` of describe block.
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
